hero.name: Hiram Acevedo

about.title: About
about.p1: Fullstack Web Developer with 21+ shipped projects, from production medical systems to AI-powered language learning tools. I build end-to-end solutions with Next.js, Python/FastAPI, Java/Spring Boot, and run local LLM inference pipelines on Apple Silicon.
about.p2: Currently finishing my CS degree at Universidad de Guadalajara (GPA 95.64/100) and completing Oracle Academy + TCS Empowers programs.
